category_note: Seven Network spans Channel Seven (broadcast TV), 7Plus (BVOD), and Seven West Media (digital + print). Confirm arm per line item.
source: STUB ENTRY — Broadcast TV specs are typically delivered via CAD (Commercial Approvals Division) or Adstream. Confirm with Seven traffic team per booking.

formats.file_type: ProRes 422 HQ (preferred) or broadcast-quality MP4 H.264
formats.audio_levels: -24 LKFS (broadcast standard, AS/NZS broadcast loudness compliance)
formats.delivery_method: CAD (Commercial Approvals Division) submission or Adstream
formats.supply_deadline_rule: Typically 3-5 business days before broadcast — confirm with Seven traffic team. CAD clearance must be obtained before delivery.
best_practice_notes: All commercials must obtain CAD clearance before going to air
Audio levels must comply with AS/NZS broadcast loudness standards
Confirm any health, financial, or therapeutic claims with CAD early — these often need extra clearance time
30-second slots are the most common Australian TV length; 15s for higher-frequency reach buys

refresh_instructions: Request Seven's current TV delivery specifications from your Seven account manager
